title: Emit package-slice local admission artifacts during Site creation
implemented: Allowed task-lifecycle and agent-memory create-site presets to materialize descriptor-only package-slice artifacts.
Preserved refusals for live storage adapter setup, DB mutation, live MCP registration, runtime hydration, capability grants, and operator-surface runtime setup.

verification.command: pnpm --dir packages\layers\cli exec vitest run test/commands/sites-create.test.ts
verification.summary: 11 tests passed including package-slice descriptor materialization
Built CLI created a temp task-lifecycle Site skeleton with package-slice, MCP descriptor, and capability policy artifacts; no task lifecycle DB was created.

remaining_blocker.smallest_missing_admission: Concrete target-Site local DB init/mutation carrier admission for create-site task-lifecycle setup.
remaining_blocker.why_blocked: The completed create-site path can materialize descriptors and admission artifacts, but live DB creation/mutation must be admitted for the target Site and adapter before task-0015 can execute.

rollback: Revert package-slice descriptor materialization edits in sites.ts and sites-create.test.ts.
No persistent Site root was created by verification; smoke roots were temporary and removed.
